listings.title: Ampex and Scotch Brand 10.5 Reels of Audio Tape
listings.body: I have 20 reels of tape.  All metal reels.  Looks like they are in good shape They have stuff recorded on them.  No way to test Ampex 407 Scotch 203, 207 and 208 One reel of Maxell $40 per reel

listings.title: 16” Kick Drum w/ Pedal
listings.body: Generic / unknown brand 16” bass drum with basic pedal. Works. One hoop slightly bent. Spur brackets kinda wobbly but work. Good Evans / Remo heads. Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Pickup only, no shipping. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff 🥁
